response:
Yes we can check how long it took for udp packet to be sent to server like ping but only one direction

To do this we can use a udp socket and measure the time between sending the packet and receiving a response

We can use the System.Net.Sockets.UdpClient class to send and receive packets

We can measure the time taken using the DateTime.Now property

We can also use the Stopwatch class for more accurate timing

We can set up a server to receive the packets and return a response

We can then calculate the time taken for the packet to travel

We can also handle errors and exceptions

This method is more efficient than ping because it only sends one direction

We can also use the NetworkInformation.GetIPv4AddressList method to get the server address
